attributes.title: github_pull_requests_efficiency_help
github_enriched
github_pull_requests_rei
attributes.visState:
{"title":"github_pull_requests_rei","type":"timelion","params":{"expression":".es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at).divide(.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=grimoire_creation_date)).label('REI').color(#99af5d),
 
.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at).divide(.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=grimoire_creation_date)).movingaverage(8w, 'left').label('REI Moving Avg. (8 weeks)').color(#c83d32),

.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at).divide(.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=grimoire_creation_date)).trend().label('REI trend'),

.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at).divide(.es(index=github_issues, q='pull_request:true', timefield=grimoire_creation_date)).aggregate(avg).label('Avg. REI').color(#e6b740)","interval":"1w"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: github_pull_requests_lead_time
attributes.visState: {"title":"github_pull_requests_lead_time","type":"timelion","params":{"expression":".es(index=github_issues, q='state:closed AND pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at, metric=avg:painless_delay).label('Avg. Lead Time (days)').color(#99af5d), \n\n.es(index=github_issues, q='state:closed AND pull_request:true', timefield=closed_at, metric=avg:painless_delay).trend().label('Avg. Lead Time trend').color(#c83d32)","interval":"1w"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.description: Efficiency panel for GitHub Pull Requests by Bitergia
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 5, "i": "1"}, "panelIndex": "1", "title": "Efficiency Closing GitHub Pull Requests", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_0"}, {"gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 5, "i": "2"}, "panelIndex": "2", "title": "REI", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_1"}, {"gridData": {"x": 32, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 5, "i": "3"}, "panelIndex": "3", "title": "Lead Time", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_2"}, {"gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 5, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "4"}, "panelIndex": "4", "title": "Time to Merge", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_3"}, {"gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 5, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "5"}, "panelIndex": "5", "title": "Repositories", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_4"}, {"gridData": {"x": 32, "y": 5, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "6"}, "panelIndex": "6", "title": "Efficiency Closing GitHub Pull Requests", "version": "6.1.0-1", "panelRefName": "panel_5"}]
attributes.title: GitHub Pull Requests Efficiency

attributes.fieldFormatMap: {"grimoire_creation_date":{"id":"date","params":{"pattern":"MMM Do YYYY"}},"author_date":{"id":"date","params":{"pattern":"MMM Do YYYY"}},"new_lines":{"id":"number","params":{"pattern":"0"}},"lines_added":{"id":"number","params":{"pattern":"0"}},"lines_removed":{"id":"number","params":{"pattern":"0"}},"demography_max_date":{"id":"date","params":{"pattern":"MMM Do YYYY, HH:mm"}},"demography_min_date":{"id":"date","params":{"pattern":"MMM Do YYYY, HH:mm"}},"author_uuid":{"id":"url","params":{"urlTemplate":"/identities/hatstall/{{rawValue}}","labelTemplate":"Go to Hatstall"}}}

attributes.title: Commits & PRs por Autor
attributes.visState: {"title": "Commits & PRs por Autor", "type": "histogram", "params": {"addLegend": true, "addTooltip": true, "addTimeMarker": false, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "labels": {"rotate": 45, "show": true}, "position": "bottom", "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "show": true, "style": {}, "title": {}, "type": "category"}], "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "legendPosition": "right", "seriesParams": [{"data": {"id": "1", "label": "Contribui\u00e7\u00f5es"}, "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "mode": "normal", "show": true, "showCircles": true, "type": "histogram", "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}], "times": [], "type": "histogram", "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "labels": {"filter": false, "rotate": 0, "show": true, "truncate": 100}, "name": "LeftAxis-1", "position": "left", "scale": {"mode": "normal", "type": "linear"}, "show": true, "style": {}, "title": {"text": "Contribui\u00e7\u00f5es"}, "type": "value"}]}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Contribui\u00e7\u00f5es"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "author_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "customLabel": "Autor"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "filters", "schema": "group", "params": {"filters": [{"input": {"query": "_index:git_enriched", "language": "lucene"}, "label": "Commits"}, {"input": {"query": "_index:github_enriched", "language": "lucene"}, "label": "Pull Requests"}]}}]}

attributes.description: Cross-source productivity: commits (git) + PRs (github) per author
attributes.title: Dev Productivity - Commits & PRs
attributes.visState: {"title": "Dev Productivity - Commits & PRs", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 25, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "author_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 30, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false, "customLabel": "Author"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "filters", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"filters": [{"input": {"query": "_index:git_enriched", "language": "lucene"}, "label": "Commits"}, {"input": {"query": "_index:github_enriched", "language": "lucene"}, "label": "Pull Requests"}]}}]}
